name: Magnesium sulfate (MgSO4)
description: CNS depressant na anticonvulsant eji maka mgbochi na ọgwụgwọ nke eclamptic ọdịdọ (ọdịdọ dị ime site na pre-eclampsia). A na-ejikwa maka ụkwara ume ọkụ siri ike na torsades de pointes. Ahịrị mbụ maka eclampsia n'elu benzodiazepines.
indications: Eclampsia (mgbochi ọdịdọ na ọgwụgwọ na pre-eclampsia siri ike)
Torsades de Pointes (polymorphic V-tach sitere na hypomagnesemia)
dose: Ngwunye Eclampsia: 4-6g IV jiri nwayọ mee ihe karịrị nkeji 20. Nlekọta: 1-2g / hour IV infusion. Ọ bụrụ na ọdịdọ na-alọghachi: 2-4g IV karịrị nkeji 5. IM loading (ma ọ bụrụ na ọ dịghị IV): 5g IM ọ bụla buttock (10g ngụkọta) n'out oge.
window: Malite na mmalite ọdịdọ ma ọ bụ na nchoputa nke njirimara pre-eclampsia siri ike.
warnings: Ihe ịrịba ama nsi: ọnwụ nke patellar reflex (akara mbụ, 7-10 mEq / L), ịda mbà n'obi nke iku ume (> 10 mEq / L), njide obi (> 15 mEq / L).
Nyochaa patellar reflexes kwa nkeji iri na ise -- ọnwụ nke reflex = kwụsị infusion.
Mgbochi maka nsi: Calcium gluconate 1g IV karịrị nkeji 3.
Belata dose na mmebi gbasara akụrụ -- nyochaa mmepụta mmamịrị.

pediatric.dose: Torsades: 25-50 mg/kg IV n'elu 10-20 min (kacha 2g). Ụkwara ume ọkụ siri ike: 25-75 mg/kg IV (max 2g).
pediatric.note: A na-ejikarị ya eme ihe maka ọdịdọ na ndị ọrịa na-abụghị ụmụaka ime ime --eclampsia bụ isi ihe na-egosi.

obstetric.note: Ngosipụta izizi. Na-agafe placenta - hypermagnesemia nwa amụrụ ọhụrụ ga-ekwe omume. Ọgwụ nwa ọhụrụ ma ọ bụrụ na nkụda mmụọ iku ume: calcium gluconate 100 mg / kg IV. Gwa ndị otu NICU maka ojiji magnesium nke nne.

source: JTS CPG: Obstetric Emergencies / Eclampsia Management Guidelines / ACOG
